utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. All 5 appear in the final coverage plan. Now check completeness: Each item must include coverage and costs. Health: includes physical and mental health insurance with specific plans and monthly costs plus a total health cost — fully specified. Property: includes home/contents insurance with plan, coverage amount, monthly cost, and total — fully specified. Travel: includes travel insurance plan, scope (adventure activities, international), monthly cost, and total — fully specified. Additional services: provides a professional liability/business support package with included features and monthly cost — fully specified. Total budget: provides subtotal, discount, monthly, promotional first month, annual cost, timeline, setup fees, and compliance status — fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: Map each selected policy name in the final plan to the exact matching item in the ground-truth ratings and return its numeric rating. The final plan includes: LifeFirst Standard Plan (physical health), HealthFirst Standard Plan (mental health), HomeFirst Standard Coverage (home contents), InsurePlus Standard Plan (travel), and Business Travel Support (as an additional service under travel enhancement). Their corresponding ratings in the ground-truth are 9, 6, 9, 10, and 6 respectively.
